fields.name: SDEN
fields.description: SMPS step-down converter enable.

fields.name: MODE_PDN
fields.description: Enables the pull down on output voltage during power-down mode.

fields.name: LPDS08V
fields.description: SMPS low-power mode enable (SVOS high only).

fields.name: POPL
fields.description: pwr_on pulse low configuration.

fields.name: PVDEN
fields.description: Programmable voltage detector enable.

fields.name: PVDO
fields.description: Programmable voltage detect output.

fields.name: VCOREMONEN
fields.description: V less than sub>DDCORE less than /sub> monitoring enable.

fields.name: VCORELLS
fields.description: V less than sub>DDCORE less than /sub> voltage detector low-level selection.

fields.name: VCOREL
fields.description: Monitored V less than sub>DDCORE less than /sub> level above low threshold.

fields.name: VCOREH
fields.description: Monitored V less than sub>DDCORE less than /sub> level above high threshold.

fields.name: TCMRBSEN
fields.description: I-TCM and D-TCM RAMs backup supply enable (used to maintain TCM RAMs content in Standby mode).

fields.name: TCMFLXRBSEN
fields.description: I-TCM FLEXMEM backup supply enable (used to maintain I-TCM FLEX MEM content in Standby mode).

fields.name: VOS
fields.description: Voltage scaling selection according to performance.

fields.name: VOSRDY
fields.description: VOS ready bit for V less than sub>CORE less than /sub> voltage scaling output selection.

fields.name: ACTVOS
fields.description: VOS currently applied for V less than sub>CORE less than /sub> voltage scaling selection.

fields.name: ACTVOSRDY
fields.description: Voltage level ready bit for currently used ACTVOS.

fields.name: MONEN
fields.description: V less than sub>BAT less than /sub> and temperature monitoring enable.

fields.name: VBATL
fields.description: V less than sub>BAT less than /sub> level monitoring versus low threshold.

fields.name: VBATH
fields.description: V less than sub>BAT less than /sub> level monitoring versus high threshold.

fields.name: TEMPL
fields.description: Temperature level monitoring versus low threshold.

fields.name: TEMPH
fields.description: Temperature level monitoring versus high threshold.

fields.name: BKPRBSEN
fields.description: Backup RAM backup supply enable (used to maintain BKPRAM content in Standby and V less than sub>BAT less than /sub> modes).

registers.name: DBPCR
registers.description: PWR disable backup protection control register.
registers.fieldset_description: PWR disable backup protection control register.

fields.name: DBP
fields.description: Disable backup domain write protection.

fields.name: PDDS
fields.description: Power-down deepsleep selection.

fields.name: CSSF
fields.description: Clear Standby and Stop flags (always read as 0).

fields.name: STOPF
fields.description: Stop flag.

fields.name: SBF
fields.description: Standby flag.

fields.name: SVOS
fields.description: System Stop mode voltage scaling selection.

registers.name: SVMCR1

registers.name: SVMCR2

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: V less than sub>DDA18ADC less than /sub> is not present. Logical and electrical isolation is applied to ignore this supply.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: V less than sub>DDA18ADC less than /sub> is valid.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: No effect.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: When written, clear the CPU flags (STOPF, SBF).

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Pull-down disabled. The output is in high impedance during the shutdown (default).

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Pull-down enabled.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Stop mode when device enters deepsleep.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Standby mode when device enters deepsleep.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: No guaranteed minimum low time.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: ~ 1 ms guaranteed minimum low time (1 x 32 LSI cycles).

variants.name: B_0x2
variants.description: ~ 2 ms guaranteed minimum low time (2 x 32 LSI cycles).

variants.name: B_0x1F
variants.description: ~ 31 ms guaranteed minimum low time (31 x 32 LSI cycles).

variants.name: B_0x0

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: CR1 can be read and written only with privileged access.

variants.name: B_0x1

variants.description: SVOS low.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: SVOS high (default).

variants.name: B_0x1

variants.description: V less than sub>DD33USB less than /sub> is equal or above the threshold of the USB33 voltage monitor.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: V less than sub>DD33USB less than /sub> is valid.

variants.description: V less than sub>BAT less than /sub> level below high threshold level.

variants.name: B_0x1

variants.description: V less than sub>BAT less than /sub> level above low threshold level.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: V less than sub>DDCORE less than /sub> low-voltage threshold 2 selected (VOS high).

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: V less than sub>DDIO2 less than /sub> is below the threshold of the VDDIO2 voltage monitor.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: V less than sub>DDIO2 less than /sub> is equal or above the threshold of the VDDIO2 voltage monitor.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: V less than sub>DDIO2 less than /sub> is not present. Logical and electrical isolation is applied to ignore this supply.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: V less than sub>DDIO2 less than /sub> is valid.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: 3v3 voltage range selected. If V less than sub>DDIO2 less than /sub> is in 1v8 range with this setting, I/Os work in degraded mode.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: 1v8 voltage range selected. HSLV_VDDIO2 option bit must be set to allow 1v8 voltage range operation. Setting this configuration while V less than sub>DDIO2 less than /sub> is in 3v3 range damages the device.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: V less than sub>DDIO3 less than /sub> is below the threshold of the VDDIO3 voltage monitor.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: V less than sub>DDIO3 less than /sub> is equal or above the threshold of the VDDIO3 voltage monitor.

variants.name: B_0x1

variants.name: B_0x1

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: V less than sub>DDIO4 less than /sub> is below the threshold of the V less than sub>DDIO4 less than /sub> voltage monitor.

variants.name: B_0x1
